campaigns.title: Email campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Prepare, validate and send transactional campaigns.
campaigns.accessDeniedDescription: You don't have any campaign access. Contact an administrator.

ats.label: ATS reminder
ats.description: Sortie authorisations: junior (parents) or adult (student) variant.

test_fr.label: French test reminder
test_fr.description: Online French level test for adult learners.

housing_confirmation.label: Housing confirmation
housing_confirmation.description: Residence info and useful phone numbers.

course_location.label: Adult course location
course_location.description: Time and venue of courses (Le Port).

payment_reminder.label: Balance reminder
payment_reminder.description: Payment reminder with Payzen link generation.

upload.title: Import a list
upload.description: File must be a Matrix or Payzen export (CSV or Excel). French headers (Nom, Hébergement, Sem. Arr.…) are recognized automatically.
upload.name: List name

lists.title: Imported lists
lists.description: Pick an existing list or upload a new one.
lists.empty: No list imported for this kind yet.
lists.name: Name

templates.pickDescription: Only templates with an active version can be used.
templates.pickPerVariantDescription: Pick a template per variant present in the list. Each recipient receives the version matching their variant.
templates.pickAllRequiredDescription: Every present variant must be mapped to a template before continuing.
templates.noVariantAvailable: No active template for the “{variant}” variant.
templates.name: Name

editor.title: MJML editor
editor.description: MJML on the left, preview on the right. Handlebars variables are supported: {'{{'}first_name{'}}'}.
editor.subject: Email subject

preview.title: Preview
preview.description: Rendered with the sample values from the variables schema.
preview.subject: Subject

testSend.title: Send a test email
testSend.description: Test sends do not count in any campaign statistics.
testSend.recipientHelp: Defaults to your account email. You can override it.

wizard.title: New campaign - {kind}
wizard.subtitle: Follow the steps to prepare, validate and send the campaign.
wizard.pickTemplate: Pick a template with an active version.

send.confirmDescription: You are about to email {count} recipient(s). This cannot be undone.
send.confirmWarning: The send is queued and processed in the background. Track its status on the campaign page.

history.title: History
history.description: All past campaigns for this type.
history.name: Name

paymentReminder.previousDescription: Pick the list of the previous reminder to diff balances against.
paymentReminder.previousPlaceholder: None — starting a new reminder cycle
paymentReminder.previousHelp: Leave empty for a fresh cycle. Otherwise the diff closes settled cycles and advances unpaid ones to the next stage.
paymentReminder.diffDescription: Comparison between the previous list and the newly uploaded one.
